channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] Song: Hibana
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Song: Hibana
Album: Sense
Release: 10/26/2021
Music: BAND-MAID
Lyrics: 小鳩ミク [Kobato, Miku]
Arrangement: BAND-MAID
1st Live:8/16/2022
#bandmaid

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 10 years ago Band-Maid played 6 songs at MOSAiC in Tokyo JP on 2016/4/24. The...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Setlist Bot (bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
10 years ago Band-Maid played 6 songs at MOSAiC in Tokyo JP on 2016/4/24. The opening song was Thrill.

BlueSky · bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 3 years ago Band-Maid played 23 songs at BIGCAT in Osaka JP on 2023/4/24. The...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Setlist Bot (bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
3 years ago Band-Maid played 23 songs at BIGCAT in Osaka JP on 2023/4/24. The opening song was DOMINATION.

BlueSky · bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] 四月初的 CENTRAL2026 音樂祭演出限時公開啦，到台灣時間週六的 22:59 而已，要補檔的抓緊時間啊
item.dc:creator: 三頭 :raised_eyebrow_cat_2: (santou_hong@g0v.social)
item.description:
四月初的 CENTRAL2026 音樂祭演出限時公開啦，到台灣時間週六的 22:59 而已，要補檔的抓緊時間啊
https://g0v.social/tags/ReoNa https://g0v.social/tags/AveMujica https://g0v.social/tags/BANDMAID

:ave_mujica: 的片段總算改善了那個垃圾混音跟運鏡 QQ
李子大人真的好帥喔......

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DMtcR8q3e7I

Mastadon · santou_hong@g0v.social
